Field.name: I.S. Non Acute Exclusive Products RD
I.S. Non Acute Exclusive Products Rep
I.S. Non Acute Exclusive Products RVP
IsKit
Field.source: Formula: IF (CategoryGroupId == '70' OR (CategoryGroupId != '70' AND (FindString(UPPERCASE(SubcategoryDesc), 'KIT') != -1) OR (FindString(UPPERCASE(SubcategoryDesc), 'TRAY') != -1) OR (FindString(UPPERCASE(SubcategoryDesc), 'LAB PRESOURCE') != -1)) AND ((FindString(UPPERCASE(SubcategoryDesc), 'KITCHEN') == -1) ) AND (FindString(UPPERCASE(SubcategoryDesc), 'FOOD') == -1) AND (FindString(UPPERCASE(SubcategoryDesc), 'SURGICAL LAP MAYO TRAYS') == -1) AND (FindString(UPPERCASE(SubcategoryDesc), 'MAYO STANDS') == -1)) AND SubcategoryId NOT IN ('700K700001304','700E700010035','700K700001004','700E700010034','700N700010038','700K700001006') THEN 1 ELSE 0 ENDIF (BatchMacro)

Field.name: IsPerformancePlus
Field.source: Formula: if [SourceTypeId] = 'NBP' and [ExternalMaterialGroupDesc] = 'Preferred' then 1 else 0 endif (BatchMacro)

Field.name: Long Term Care RD Node ID
Long Term Care Rep Node ID
Long Term Care RVP Node ID

SelectField.field: I.S. Acute Hospitals RD Node ID
I.S. Acute Hospitals Rep Node ID
I.S. Acute Hospitals RVP Node ID
I.S. Non Acute Exclusive Products RD
I.S. Non Acute Exclusive Products Rep
I.S. Non Acute Exclusive Products RVP
Long Term Care RD Node ID
Long Term Care Rep Node ID
Long Term Care RVP Node ID

Field.name: SPECLevel4

Field.name: SPECLevel5
Field.source: File: odbc:DSN=Prod - MasterProduction|||select AnalyticsGateway.dbo.CustomerMaster.* from AnalyticsGateway.dbo.CustomerMaster

FormulaField.expression: if [CrosswalkSource] = "CCA" then "2" elseif [CrosswalkSource] = "MDM" then "3" elseif [CrosswalkSource] = "BSM" then "1" else "4" endif
